candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Appears directly under 'Cost of sales' with a corresponding 'Cost of sales - Balancing value', indicating it is a component of the selected total COGS row rather than a separate same-level operating expense to add.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of sales
candidates.why: Label indicates a sub-component within cost of sales; with selected COGS mapped to the parent total 'Cost of sales', adding this separately would likely double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Development cost in Cost of sales
candidates.why: Explicitly labelled as being in cost of sales, so it reads as a nested component of the selected 'Cost of sales' total, not a separate bucket to add.
Explicitly a cost-of-sales component. Since 'Cost of sales' itself was selected as the parent bucket, this should not be added separately absent evidence it sits outside that total.
Explicitly labelled as inside COGS and therefore likely already embedded in the selected 'Cost of sales' row.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the parent total 'Cost of sales'. The visible COGS D&A lines appear as sub-components beneath that total, reinforced by the adjacent balancing row. To avoid double counting, no separate COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This label appears as a D&A component associated with the selected SG&A component rows ('Sales and marketing expenses' and separately 'Administration expenses'), with balancing-value rows showing it is embedded in those parent totals rather than outside them.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Appears as a component within 'Development expenses' with a matching balancing row, so it is already embedded in the selected development-expense parent. Also, 'Development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would distort the intended XSGA-XRD construction.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Sales and marketing expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly a component inside the selected 'Sales and marketing expenses' row, so separate addition would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Sales and marketing expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly labelled as inside sales and marketing expenses and therefore treated as embedded in the selected parent row.
Reads as a nested component of the selected 'Administration expenses' row, not a separate same-level overhead line.
Reads as a nested component of the selected 'Administration expenses' row, so it should not be added separately.
Explicitly a component of the selected 'Development expenses' row and should not be added separately.
Explicitly a component of the selected 'Development expenses' row and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is the sum of the parent rows 'Sales and marketing expenses', 'Administration expenses', and 'Development expenses'. The visible D&A rows sit beneath those parents and are paired with balancing-value rows, indicating they are already included. In addition, R&D is already handled symmetrically via 'Development expenses' in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so R&D D&A should not be added separately.
